---
title: "PREVENT-AD Biomarker Associations"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(ggpubr)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

clinical_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_OUTPUT_PATHS$data$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_clinical_imp_raw.rds"))
apoe <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_apoe.rds"))
grs <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_GRS.rds"))
biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_biomarkers.rds"))
cogd_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_OUTPUT_PATHS$data$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_cogd_scored_dat.rds"))
libra_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_OUTPUT_PATHS$data$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_libra_scored_dat.rds"))
fhx <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_fhx_dat.rds"))

baseline_dat <- fhx %>%
  left_join((clinical_raw %>%
               select(CONP_ID, Sex, Education_years)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((biomarkers %>%
               group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
               slice(1)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(apoe, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((grs %>%
               select(CONP_ID, GRS)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((cogd_dat %>% 
               select(CONP_ID, score_cogd=score)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((libra_dat %>% 
               select(CONP_ID, score_libra2=score)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  select(CONP_ID, score_cogd, score_libra2, GRS, Candidate_Age, Sex,
         Education_years, ptau181_simoa_UGOT, ptau217_simoa_UGOT, AB_ratio_simoa_4plex, 
         NFL_simoa_4plex, GFAP_simoa_4plex, apoe_category) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ptau181_simoa_UGOT, ptau217_simoa_UGOT, AB_ratio_simoa_4plex,
             NFL_simoa_4plex, GFAP_simoa_4plex),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  )
```

# Biomarker data availability table
```{r}
biomarker_cols <- names(biomarkers)[7:18]

df1 <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(biomarker_cols),
      ~any(!is.na(.)),  # TRUE if participant has at least 1 measurement
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

table1 <- df1 %>%
  select(-CONP_ID) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    type = everything() ~ "dichotomous",
    statistic = list(everything() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"),
    digits = list(everything() ~ c(0, 1))
  ) %>%
  modify_header(
    label = "**Biomarker**",
    stat_0 = "**N Participants with Data (%)**"
  ) %>%
  modify_footnote(
    stat_0 ~ "Participants counted if they have at least 1 measurement for that biomarker"
  ) %>%
  #bold_labels() %>%
  italicize_labels() %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "normal"), 
                 cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  )

table1
```


# Biomarker levels by APOE category (baseline)
```{r}
library(broom)

pval_df1 <- baseline_dat %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ apoe_category))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot1 <- baseline_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=apoe_category, y=measure, fill=apoe_category)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  geom_text(data = pval_df1,
            aes(Inf, Inf, label = p_label),
            hjust = 2,
            vjust = 1.5,
            size = 3,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "APOE Category",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by APOE Category in PREVENT-AD") +
  theme(legend.position="none")

plot1
# ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_APOE_vs_BBM.png"), plot1)
```

# Biomarker trajectories
```{r}
biomarkers_longer <- biomarkers %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ptau181_simoa_UGOT, ptau217_simoa_UGOT, AB_ratio_simoa_4plex,
             NFL_simoa_4plex, GFAP_simoa_4plex),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  ) %>%
  mutate(age_centered = Candidate_Age - 65)

plot2 <- ggplot(biomarkers_longer, aes(x=Candidate_Age, y=measure)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=CONP_ID), linewidth=0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "PREVENT-AD Individual Biomarker Trajectories")
plot2

plot3 <- ggplot(biomarkers_longer, aes(x=Candidate_Age, y=measure)) +
  # indiv trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group=CONP_ID), alpha=0.1, linewidth=0.3) +
  # mean trajectories
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "PREVENT-AD Mean Biomarker Trajectories")
plot3
  
# Saving plots
#ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_BBM_traj_indiv.png"), plot2)
ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_BBM_traj_mean.png"), plot3)
```


# Biomarker associations (baseline)
## GRS:biomarkers
```{r}
pval_df1 <- baseline_dat %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ GRS))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot4 <- baseline_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = GRS, y = measure)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = pval_df1,
            aes(Inf, Inf, label = p_label), 
            hjust = 1,
            vjust = 2,
            size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales="free") + 
  labs(x = "GRS",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "GRS and AD Blood-based Biomarker Levels in PREVENT-AD") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") 
plot4

ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_GRS_vs_BBM.png"), plot4)
```


## CogDrisk:biomarkers
```{r}
library(glue)

pval_df2 <- baseline_dat %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ score_cogd))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot5 <- baseline_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score_cogd, y = measure)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = pval_df2,
            aes(Inf, -Inf, label = p_label), 
            hjust = 1,
            vjust = -1,
            size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales="free") + 
  labs(x = "CogDrisk Score",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "CogDrisk Score and AD Blood-based Biomarker Levels in PREVENT-AD") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") 
plot5

ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_CogD_vs_BBM.png"), plot5)
```


## LIBRA2:biomarkers 
```{r}
pval_df3 <- baseline_dat %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ score_libra2 + Candidate_Age + Sex + Education_years))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot6 <- baseline_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score_libra2, y = measure)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = pval_df3,
            aes(Inf, Inf, label = p_label), 
            hjust = 1,
            vjust = 2,
            size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales="free") + 
  labs(x = "LIBRA2 Score",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "LIBRA2 Score and AD Blood-based Biomarker Levels in PREVENT-AD",
       subtitle = "ANOVA p-value for sex, age, and education years") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") 
plot6

#ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_LIBRA2_vs_BBM.png"), plot6)
```
